name: Spam Imperial Tortilla Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Cucumber, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine SPAM and cream cheese.
2. Stir in chopped green onion and chopped fresh dill.
3. Spread one-third of the SPAM mixture evenly over each tortilla.
4. Top with one-third of cucumber, sunflower seeds, and alfalfa sprouts.
5. Roll up each tortilla tightly into a roll (jelly roll fashion).
6. Wrap in plastic wrap.
7. Repeat with remaining tortillas.
8. Refrigerate for 2 hours.
9. To serve, cut each roll in half.
